item.title: 2020 3/4 In Review
item.description: I always wanted to blog as far as I can remember but for some reason it never came to fruition. Probably because I am very lazy. But this time I have made my mind that I will blog every week no matter how silly the posts are. This gives me an opportunity to introspect about my life and also a nice way to improve my english language skills. I don’t have to mention how good 2020 is for everyone :).

item.title: About
item.description: A passionate computer programmer, avid movie watcher and a cat lover :) Find me on GitHub
